as_name.default: นางรวีวรรณ ช่อดอก

root.sql:
SELECT pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!sysdate_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate ,sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno ,sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_mem_name as membername ,sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ,'!as_name_1!' as as_name ,'!as_name_1!' as as_name ,(select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as coop_name
,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai (sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance) as thai_principal_balance ,sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result = '1' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no in ( select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no )
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '085480' ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.contract_memno ASC, sc_mem_m_resign_loncoll.loan_contract_no ASC

r_ktm_book_alert_mem_loan_1_nest_coll.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code , '0' ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' )) as resignation_approve_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as group_name_coll ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no as group_no_coll ,(select sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) as begining_of_contract ,(select sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) as principal_balance ,(select pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai (sum(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance)) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) as thai_principal_balance
FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {1} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '3' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ASC
